description_long: This is a compact, single-story urban house with a modern, minimalist design. The exterior features white brick walls, large black-framed windows, and a flat roof, with a prominent covered porch area at the front. The porch is furnished and partially enclosed with white railings, providing a welcoming outdoor space. The interior layout is visible, showing a bedroom, kitchen, and living area, all decorated in soft pastel tones with contemporary furnishings. The house includes a rear utility area and a side entrance, both accessible via standard doors. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a mix of large and small windows providing natural light to different rooms.
description: A modern, single-story white brick house with a flat roof, covered porch, and large windows, featuring a compact and open interior layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and large black-framed windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white brick wall, side entrance, and glimpses of the interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, smaller windows, and the pastel-colored interior spaces.
description_view_3: Angled view of the porch area, main entrance, and a clear look at the bedroom and living spaces inside.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with white railings, a single door, and an overhead awning.
